en: What is this? Happy holidays, Dwight.
But do not open it till Christmas.
You were so pathetic. How long did this take you, three hours?
ko: 너 정말 한심하다. 이거 만드는 데 얼마나 걸렸어, 세 시간?

en: Five minutes, actually. I am a black belt in gift wrapping.
Yeah, no such thing. They don't give out black belts for things that are stupid.
ko: 그런 거 없어. 바보 같은 것에는 검은 띠를 안 줘.

en: Well, I hope it was worth it,
ko: 음, 그럴 만한 가치가 있었길 바라.

en: because I'm going to take it apart in about five minutes.
I think it'll take you a little bit longer than that. Really?
ko: 그보다 좀 더 오래 걸릴 걸. 정말?

en: If I can skin a mule deer in less than ten minutes, I ought to be able to handle this.
ko: 내가 노새사슴 가죽을 10분 안에 벗길 수 있는데, 이 정도는 문제없지.
